payload.answer: Current architecture preference: Brain DB as the source of truth, Cognee as a rebuildable semantic projection, and Slack as a strict memory intake agent. Open questions remain about adding Telegram later and selecting the cheapest model that still saturates performance.
payload.decision: Store the current architecture preferences as tentative: Brain DB is the source of truth, Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection, and Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Preserve open questions about adding Telegram later and choosing the cheapest model that still saturates performance.

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entity identifiers were provided, and the summary does not require disambiguation beyond named systems.

payload.intent: Extract durable memory from a chat summary about Brain architecture and open questions.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Whether Telegram should be added later remains undecided.
The cheapest model that still saturates performance has not yet been identified.

details: Preserved unresolved questions as open items.
Avoided promoting tentative decisions beyond the summary.

repair_options: If Telegram is adopted later, add it as a candidate integration without changing Brain DB as source of truth.
If a model benchmark is available, record the selected model only after confirming cost-performance saturation.
